project_type: Python desktop + CLI + library for Salesforce STF translation workflow
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, editable install with pip install -e '.[gui,dev]'
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory, no conftest.py yet; existing 65 tests across 9 files
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' 2. pytest -q (all tests pass) 3. For GUI tests: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest tests/gui/
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Python 3.10-3.12 available via pyenv. No Windows for testing .bat launchers. PySide6 requires libGL (install mesa-libGL). GUI tests need QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen.
contribution_requirements: Tests must pass with pytest -q. Code uses ruff for linting. Target Python 3.9+.
key_patterns: Frozen dataclass Entry, mutable Document. Translator protocol in translate/base.py. Factory pattern in translate/factory.py. GUI uses PySide6 QThread workers in workers.py. Settings via QSettings wrapper in gui/settings.py. Typer CLI in cli.py. Tests use plain pytest assertions, no fixtures file yet.
directory_structure: src/stx/ - main package. src/stx/gui/ - PySide6 GUI. src/stx/gui/pages/ - 6 pipeline phases. src/stx/translate/ - backends + runner. src/stx/stf/ - STF parser/writer. src/stx/excel/ - Excel import/export. tests/ - pytest tests. scripts/ - utility scripts.
